title: MMKV-backed Reanimated shared values
design_brief: Persist Reanimated shared value to MMKV without bridge thrash.
mobile_reasoning: Debounced write via useAnimatedReaction.

title: Long-press to enter edit mode (jiggle, like home screen)
design_brief: Long-press a grid of items → all items wiggle. Similar to iOS home screen rearrangement.
mobile_reasoning: Per-item slight rotation oscillation. Long-press triggers global edit mode.

title: Sheet with horizontal swipe at top to peek next item
design_brief: Sheet allows previewing neighboring items with a small drag.
mobile_reasoning: Horizontal pan at top of sheet reveals 20% of next sheet content.

title: FlashList with shimmer placeholders during initial load
design_brief: Initial load: show 10 shimmer rows. Data arrival: swap to real items.
mobile_reasoning: Pre-populate data with skeleton items, replace with real on fetch.
performance_notes: Same FlashList component just with different data.

title: Range slider (min + max thumbs)
design_brief: Two-thumb slider for ranges (price, age). Reference: Airbnb filters.
mobile_reasoning: Two thumbs, each with its own Pan, constrained against the other.

title: Detail screen with right-edge swipe to next item
design_brief: From a list-detail flow, swipe right edge to navigate to the next item without going back to list.
mobile_reasoning: Edge swipe triggers router push to next item id.

title: Auto-hiding header on chat keyboard appearance
design_brief: When keyboard opens, collapse chat header to save vertical space.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Header takes full space when keyboard up
mobile_reasoning: Header height interpolated from kb shared value.

title: Animated typewriter effect via Skia
design_brief: Text appears one character at a time. Reference: chat AI responses.
mobile_reasoning: Shared value index drives substring; useDerivedValue + Skia Text.

title: Voice note inline player with progress
design_brief: WhatsApp-style voice message: play button + waveform + duration. Reference: WhatsApp voice messages.
mobile_reasoning: Reuse Waveform from rn-020 with play state.

title: Custom info card on marker tap
design_brief: Tap marker → custom card slides in from bottom (not the default callout).
mobile_reasoning: Suppress native callout; use marker onPress + state-driven card from below.

title: Live updating mini-graph for vitals
design_brief: Real-time updating graph (heart rate from wearable).
mobile_reasoning: Push new data point; Skia path recomputed via useDerivedValue.

title: Holographic / iridescent surface
design_brief: Holographic card with shifting colors based on tilt.
mobile_reasoning: DeviceMotion via expo-sensors → tilt drives gradient shift.

title: Avoid measure() on every render
design_brief: Cache measurements; only re-measure on layout change.
mobile_reasoning: Use onLayout to capture once.
solution: // usePersistedLayout.ts\nimport {useState, useCallback} from 'react';\nexport function useCapturedLayout() { const [layout, setLayout] = useState({x:0, y:0, width:0, height:0}); const onLayout = useCallback((e: any) => setLayout(e.nativeEvent.layout), []); return {layout, onLayout}; }
interaction_details: onLayout fires only when size changes

title: Switch control alternative for one-button navigation
design_brief: App fully navigable via single switch (iOS Switch Control). All actions reachable.
mobile_reasoning: All custom gestures need accessibilityActions equivalents.
interaction_details: Switch users can trigger all actions

title: Photo metadata viewer (EXIF info)
design_brief: View EXIF data (camera model, location, date) for a photo.
mobile_reasoning: expo-image-picker / expo-media-library returns EXIF when permitted.

title: Marker callout with image
design_brief: When user taps marker, show a callout with image + title.
mobile_reasoning: Marker.Callout with custom content + cached image.

title: Sunburst chart (hierarchical pie)
design_brief: Concentric pie chart for hierarchy. Reference: file size breakdowns.
mobile_reasoning: Skia arcs per ring; tap drill-down.

title: Drag handle that auto-suggests release point
design_brief: While dragging an item, the snap target highlights/grows.
mobile_reasoning: Compute nearest target during drag; animate target scale.
interaction_details: Drop target highlights as drag approaches

title: Date picker as inline calendar
design_brief: Inline calendar grid in a form field (not separate picker).
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Modal date picker for inline UX
mobile_reasoning: Use DateRangePicker single-date variant inline.

title: Tab bar with center action that opens fullscreen modal
design_brief: Center 'Create' tab launches a fullscreen modal instead of a screen.
mobile_reasoning: Center button uses tabPress event to prevent default + open modal.
solution: // app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx\nimport {Tabs, router} from 'expo-router';\nexport default function Layout() { return (<Tabs><Tabs.Screen name='index'/><Tabs.Screen name='compose' options={{tabBarButton: (props: any) => null}} listeners={{tabPress: (e) => { e.preventDefault(); router.push('/modal-compose'); }}}/></Tabs>); }

title: Newspaper aesthetic: serif headlines, ruled columns
design_brief: Mobile news app styled like print: serif headlines, narrow columns, ruled separators.
mobile_reasoning: Custom serif + narrow column width + 1px ruled lines.

title: App backgrounding handling (pause video, save draft)
design_brief: On app backgrounding (AppState: background), pause active media and save drafts.
mobile_reasoning: AppState listener.

title: Item lift on long-press preview
design_brief: Long-press item → it lifts (scale + shadow) showing preview state.
mobile_reasoning: Long-press triggers spring scale + shadow.

title: Animated gradient text fill
design_brief: Text filled with animated gradient.
mobile_reasoning: Skia Text with LinearGradient that shifts via shared value.

title: Background photo upload queue
design_brief: Queue photo uploads in background even after user leaves screen.
mobile_reasoning: Background task via expo-background-fetch or react-native-background-upload.
solution: // uploadQueue.ts (concept)\nimport * as FileSystem from 'expo-file-system';\nexport async function enqueueUpload(uri: string, url: string) { const task = FileSystem.createUploadTask(url, uri, {httpMethod: 'POST'}); await task.uploadAsync(); }

title: Map snapshot with overlaid pin and label
design_brief: Snapshot a location preview with custom pin and label baked in.
mobile_reasoning: Take map snapshot, composite UI overlays via Skia.

title: Treemap (proportional rectangles)
design_brief: Display proportional rectangles. Reference: disk usage, market cap maps.
mobile_reasoning: Squarified treemap algorithm + Skia rects.

title: Risograph print look: limited palette, halftone
design_brief: Riso-style: 2-3 limited colors, halftone texture.
mobile_reasoning: Limited palette + Skia dot patterns for halftone.

title: Avoid unnecessary StyleSheet objects
design_brief: Use StyleSheet.create once per file. Don't recreate inline.
mobile_reasoning: StyleSheet.create only at module scope.

title: Conditional field reveal based on toggle
design_brief: Toggle reveals additional fields with animation (e.g., 'Custom amount' toggle reveals input).
mobile_reasoning: Conditional render + Reanimated layout exit/entry.
